notes: Official food page confirms the cafe food scope; item names and prices were cross-checked against a public menu mirror at https://my-awesome-cafe.restaurants-world.net/menu because the official page is mostly image/overview content.

items.name: My Awesome Salad
items.description: Salad with smoked salmon, herb chicken breast, parma ham, roasted pumpkin and tomato.

items.name: My Awesome Sandwich
items.description: Sandwich with smoked salmon, herb chicken breast, parma ham and toasted brie.

items.name: My Awesome Vegetarian Salad Or Sandwich
items.description: Vegetarian salad or sandwich with egg, roasted vegetables, tomatoes, seeds and cheese.

items.name: French Shredded Duck Confit Mayo
items.description: Duck confit burger with mayo.

items.name: Peppered Roast Beef Black Truffle Mushroom Dip
items.description: Roast beef burger with black truffle mushroom dip.

items.name: Vegetarian Burger
items.description: Vegetarian burger with egg, roasted pumpkin, carrots and cherry tomatoes.

items.name: Spicy Thai Beef Wrap
items.description: Thai-spiced beef wrap with coconut oil, shallots and lime.

items.name: New Fortune En Pappillote Chicken
items.description: Oven-baked peri-peri chicken breast with vegetables.

items.name: Awesome Duck Platter
items.description: Duck sharing platter with several duck preparations and walnuts.

items.name: Drinkable Idea I Am Awesome Bulb
items.description: Coconut water drink with goji berries and chia seeds.

notes: Official Nylon shop page lists current roasted coffee products. In-store espresso bar drinks rotate or are not fully published on the page, so this batch uses official current coffee retail menu items.

items.name: Colombia Juan Martin
items.description: Filter-roast coffee with berry, red plum, nectarine and orange tea notes.

items.name: Nicaragua Finca Libre
items.description: Espresso-roast coffee with grape, dried fruit and milk chocolate notes.

items.name: Ethiopia Banko Gotiti
items.description: Filter-roast Ethiopian coffee with raspberry, lemonade, peach and bergamot notes.

items.name: xPods for xBloom
items.description: xBloom coffee pods with dried pineapple, golden raisin, apricot and plum notes.

items.name: Brazil FAF Organic
items.description: Organic Brazil coffee with red apple, cherry, raisin and milk chocolate notes.

items.name: Colombia La Union
items.description: Espresso-roast Colombia coffee with dark cherry, black grape, raisin and chocolate notes.

notes: Official menu page; prices shown inclusive of GST. Representative brunch items selected from the Mornings menu.

items.name: Banana Bread
items.description: Banana bread with espresso mascarpone, seed brittle and cranberries.

items.name: Chia Pudding & Yogurt
items.description: Chia pudding with Greek yogurt, banana, blueberries, granola and almond butter.

items.name: Super Nutty
items.description: Acai bowl with granola, fruits, cacao nibs, almond butter and honey.

items.name: Hotcakes & Passionfruit Curd
items.description: Diner-style pancakes with passionfruit curd, blueberries, maple and butter.

items.name: The Gentleman's Relish
items.description: Soft scrambled eggs with tomatoes, compound butter, honey mascarpone and sourdough.

items.name: Chorizo, Eggs & Avo
items.description: Pork chorizo, sunny eggs, smashed avocado and sourdough.

items.name: French Toast With Many Berries
items.description: Brioche French toast with yogurt, berries and berry compote.

items.name: Mushroom Confit with Poached Eggs
items.description: Mushroom confit with vine tomatoes, spinach, avocado, poached eggs and sourdough.

items.name: Scrambled White & Greens
items.description: Egg whites with kale, asparagus, spinach, edamame, avocado spread and parmesan.

items.name: Wurst Rosti
items.description: Potato rosti with cheese frank, eggs, bacon fennel sauce and tomato chutney.

notes: Official Heritage/Tanjong Pagar menu; prices are before GST and dine-in service charge per source note.

items.name: Chia Seed Pudding
items.description: Chia pudding with coconut, fruits, honey, walnut and mascarpone.

items.name: Granola
items.description: House granola with Greek-style yogurt, fruits and mixed nuts.

items.name: Kale Salad
items.description: Kale salad with avocado, chickpea, edamame, pomegranate, feta and honey mustard.

items.name: Avocado & Eggs
items.description: Sourdough with poached eggs, avocado, cherry tomatoes, guacamole, dukkah and ricotta.

items.name: Smoked Salmon Rosti
items.description: House rosti with poached eggs, smoked salmon, creme fraiche and hollandaise.

items.name: Beer-battered Fish & Chips
items.description: Beer-battered snapper with pea mash, tartar sauce and fries.

items.name: Wagyu Cheeseburger
items.description: Wagyu patty in a potato bun with cheddar, caramelised onions and fries.

items.name: Rigatoni Pomodoro
items.description: House rigatoni with zucchini, basil, feta and tomato sauce.

items.name: Mushroom Risotto
items.description: Risotto with wild mushrooms and grana padano.

items.name: Five Oars Waffles
items.description: Sourdough waffles with espresso caramel, nuts, mascarpone, granola and ice cream.
